sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52496" key="kalamhfa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμη-φάγος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[φᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devouring reeds</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cutting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trimming pens</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Χάλυψ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.65.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Sil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
